mnemonics: VENABLES: Very Efficient Numerical Analysis Brings Lucid, Elegant Statistics
keyPoints: R is a comprehensive programming environment designed specifically for data analysis and graphics
It provides a wide array of statistical and graphical techniques, including linear and nonlinear modeling, classical statistical tests, time-series analysis, classification, and clustering
The environment is highly extensible through user-created packages, making it a versatile tool for data scientists
commonMistakes: Attempting to use R like a general-purpose programming language (e.g., Java or Python) instead of leveraging its specialized data-oriented functions
Ignoring the built-in vectorized operations and instead using inefficient loops for data manipulation
Overlooking the help and documentation system (?function) when unsure how to use a specific function
